name: Twin Towers
approxRentRange: $2,483-$2,645/month for 2BR (sources vary; range as of mid-2026)
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 baths (1,250 sqft); studios and 1BR units have 1 bath. Building is 15 stories.

notes.petPolicy: Up to 2 pets; dogs up to 80 lbs each; $25/month pet rent per pet
notes.laundry: Shared coin-op laundry rooms in basement (two per tower); no in-unit W/D confirmed by features page and resident reviews despite a data error on the main marketing page
notes.climate: Single-duct building HVAC converted seasonally (cooling in summer, heat in winter); residents cannot control both modes independently; some reviews note poor AC performance
notes.balcony: ApartmentList lists patio/balcony as a unit feature; official Southern Management site and RentCafe do not mention balconies; unconfirmed
notes.maintenance: Reviews split: majority call building reasonably clean and well-maintained with responsive staff; some describe amenities as outdated
notes.location: Adjacent to Silver Spring Metro (Red Line); Walk Score 99
